posts.text: 99 on high point you are my hero please don’t clue me in on your political beliefs

Great effort from Siena in the first half but the pace and rhythm of the game is all tilting towards Duke. Second half will be a bloodbath but respect for all the Long Island dudes on Siena we see you
Woke 2.0 starts with dook and Wisconsin losing
We as a press corps need to come clean and admit we did not properly cover the Afroman trial.
I’m sorry but Reed Shepard looks like he’s in a movie about a kid who got three wishes and now can play in the NBA
The sixteen seeds shouldn’t have to play in the play in.
This is like watching u10 in the champions league lmaoooo
wtf southwest changed its seating system?

Lindy West is one of the great take artists of all time. Nobody ever better at generating millions of takes from everyone with an opinion. Every sentence fine tuned to make you get mad enough to post about her.

I’m torn between ‘he should never play again’ and ‘this should legal’


Basketball Forever (@bballforever_)

Alex Caruso just blocked a shot with his shoe 😂

He was called for a goal-tend and a technical foul ☠️ 

(via NBA)

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/bballforever_/status/2034059227346711028#m

the book I've got coming out soon is about how so much of child raising for the middle classes is built off this model, how this leads to alienation and loss of community (and doesn't produce better athletes, mathematicians, or anything). Stay tuned.


Coach Switala (@CoachSwit)

Travel baseball has turned into:

Pay tons of money to play.
Pay to travel.
Pay to stay.
Pay to watch your own kid.

And somehow… this became normal.  Will it ever change or just get worse?



— https://nitter.net/Coach
Wrote about old hippies and political identity through music. newyorker.com/news/fault-lin…
The rockets are if arsenal was bad

this is like 15% NIL/transfer portal, 40% big name coaches aren't as big anymore, 10% conference realignment hangover crap, and 35% no centralized national cbb coverage.


Conor Sen (@conorsen)

None of my friends/groupchats have had any March Madness banter yet. The tournament is starting to move towards that Kentucky Derby level where people are excited about the pageantry of the event but there aren’t any stars or storylines.



— https://nitter.net/conorsen/status/2033576117215314425#m
I do think this year tho probably is a spike in interest just bc of the stars who will be playing.

from last weeks @ttsgpod we talked to @Rob_Malley and @stephenwertheim about Iran. Rob here explains how so much is flipped upside down now in terms of who is the rational actor and who is not and his thinking while working for the Obama and Biden admins.
